data.content:
Plan review: APPROVED.

The plan correctly identifies:
1. Mirroring the existing per-provider normaliser shape.
2. The /-split + trailing numeric regex rule, with clear examples for all AC shapes.
3. The wiring into normalizeAgentIdentity (replacing 7-line passthrough).
4. The new test file plus expected adjustment to existing OpenCode test in agent-identity.test.ts.
5. The version-precedence inversion for OpenCode (parsed wins over caller-supplied) which is the actual bug fix and is consistent with the AC ('NEVER pulls a version from runtime hint').

Risks: LOW. Pure addition + wired replacement. No callers outside agent-identity.ts and tests.

Trailing-numeric rule documented as comment per AC.
